title: Backtest As-of Gate Validation

changes: Added asOfDate to POST body and GET query param
asOfDb passed to backtestFromDB as 4th arg
asOfDb passed to backtestFromDBRegimeAware as 8th arg
backtestFromDB: stockQuote WHERE date lte asOfDb
backtestFromDBRegimeAware: stockQuote WHERE date lte asOfDb
Response includes asOfDate, asOfGateStatus: ACTIVE, asOfGateNote
stockQuote.findMany: date: { gte: startDateStr, lte: asOfDb }
Response includes asOfDate, asOfGateStatus: ACTIVE, asOfGateNote

preExistingQuirk: backtestFromDB uses fromDate.toISOString().slice(0,10) for gte (YYYY-MM-DD format vs YYYYMMDD DB format). This is a pre-existing issue, not modified in P0-03.
futureRowProtection: ACTIVE for both routes — all stockQuote queries now have lte: asOfDb upper bound
